title: Emergency Food Support for Flood-Affected Families
shortDescription: Help provide emergency food assistance to families struggling to recover after devastating floods in Kurigram.
beneficiary: Flood-affected families across vulnerable communities in Kurigram
story: Severe flooding across Kurigram has forced hundreds of families from their homes, leaving many without reliable access to food, clean water, and safe shelter. Entire communities have seen roads submerged, farmland damaged, and local markets disrupted, making daily survival increasingly difficult.

For many families, the flood arrived with little warning. Homes that took years to build were damaged within days, while stored food supplies were lost to rising water. Parents are now struggling to provide basic meals for their children while living in temporary shelters or overcrowded community spaces.

Although emergency response efforts have begun, many vulnerable households remain underserved due to damaged transportation routes and limited local resources. Elderly residents, children, and families with limited income face the greatest challenges as recovery continues.

This campaign will help fund emergency food packages containing essential items such as rice, lentils, cooking oil, salt, and other daily necessities. Local volunteers and community leaders will coordinate distribution efforts to ensure assistance reaches families with the most urgent needs.

Every contribution, regardless of size, helps provide immediate relief to people facing uncertainty and hardship. With your support, we can deliver critical food assistance while helping communities take their first steps toward recovery and stability.

updates.title: Initial Assessment Completed
updates.content: Volunteer teams completed field assessments across the most heavily affected communities and identified priority households requiring immediate food assistance.

updates.title: First Distribution Phase Underway
updates.content: Emergency food packages have started reaching families in several flood-affected areas. Distribution efforts will continue throughout the coming weeks.
